MOTION To Compel Verified Responses To Written Discovery And To Have Request For Admissions Deemed Admitted, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Charles Park, Esq., for defendant and moving party Foster Wheeler; no other appearances.

RULING:
Defendant Foster Wheeler LLC's Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Written Discovery And To Have Request For Admissions Deemed Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to Defendant's Special And Form Interrogatories and Defendant's Request For Production Of Documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's Request For Admissions To Plaintiff are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $980, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
